notes:
This is report for a beta version of Tropico 6 which is windows-only.
Pretty much everything works out of box.
On the 1st run white screen will appear after the initial loading. That's supposed to be a message from devs but it does not displays properly. Press ESC and it won't appear again.
title: Tropico 6

notes: I initially installed the native client for this game, but since its using OpenGL, I re-installed to use the Windows version on proton, and it runs better on my system. Its nice that a native client exists, but as long as it doesn't use Vulkan, I'll keep using the proton version.
title: Tropico 6

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3550H with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: i have to remove the launcher in order to make it work, after that runs smother than the native version
title: Tropico 6

notes: Kalipso Launcher will crash right after start but it can be bypassed by removing the "launcher" directory. After that game will work perfectly, even better than the native version.
title: Tropico 6
